hypothesis: E-25: E-21 (center=0.2 30ep) + T=7. E-22 proved T=7 is the highest information-gain architecture change (+0.020 mIoU at 8ep, 0.300 at ep4). Hypothesis: T=7 at 30ep forms a stable plateau beyond E-21's 0.3126 — not just an early peak. Key tests: (a) does mIoU sustain or degrade after peak? (b) does R@0.5/R@0.3 improve with longer training? (c) is the FPS/epoch-time cost justified by mIoU gain? warmup=3 matching E-21 convention.
